content:
When the omnibox or URL bar slides down on mobile, I get this grey sliver at the bottom of the viewport on my phone just like in the gif under the advertisement at the bottom. Ive tried every type of unit to fix this including dvh and lvh and svh.
AI's solutions dont work and mess things up worse in my app.
I know there must be a solution because there are many sites that dont have this problem. When I inspect, I dont see anything that looks unique. I must be missing something!
I dont think I have asked for dev help on here in years, so I apologize if Im not following proper etiquette. I appreciate any help.

  submitted by   /u/errdayimshuffln
[link]   [comments]
